content: 🚀 Big news! Our 20% off sale starts today — every product, no exceptions. Tag a friend who needs this. #TUCSale #MarkAI

Treat yourself — 20% off storewide, today only.

content: We're pleased to announce a limited-time 20% reduction across our entire catalogue. An excellent opportunity for teams planning their next procurement cycle.

variants: A 20% storewide reduction — built for teams that plan ahead.

content:
Subject: Your 20% off starts now

Hi there,

For a limited time, everything in our store is 20% off. No codes, no exclusions — the discount is applied automatically at checkout.
